introSection: Äppelmasken (Apple Mask) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Ölands Djur & Nöjespark in Färjestaden, Kalmar, Sweden.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and green supports. Used to feature pink track and green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Äppelmasken (Apple Mask) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Ölands Djur & Nöjespark in Färjestaden, Kalmar, Sweden.



Yellow track and green supports. Used to feature pink track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
